specific_question: By July 15, 2025, had Elexion Automotive completed its transition to fully automated inventory management across all production facilities?
answer: Yes. Internal operations records confirm that by July 15, 2025, Elexion Automotive had finalized its shift to a fully automated inventory management system across all of its 60 production plants.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
